zh.Ryton, Shropshire, England: 英國英格蘭史洛普爾盧頓
zh.Cardington, Bedfordshire, England, UK: 英國英格蘭貝德福爾卡丁頓
zh.Ruyton of the Eleven Towns, Shropshire,: 英國史洛普爾勒頓 希 堂斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margeriae於大約1553年出生在英國史洛普爾勒頓 希 堂斯時，她的父親William Lloyd27歲，母親Mrs William Lloyd30歲。她於1541年2月7日與Thomas Kynaston or Knutson在英國英格蘭史洛普爾米德爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1635年8月12日在英國英格蘭史洛普爾享年83歲。

zh-hans.Ryton, Shropshire, England: 英国英格兰史洛普爾盧頓
zh-hans.Cardington, Bedfordshire, England, UK: 英国英格兰貝德福爾卡丁頓
zh-hans.Ruyton of the Eleven Towns, Shropshire,: 英国史洛普爾勒頓 希 堂斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margeriae于大约1553年出生在英国史洛普爾勒頓 希 堂斯时，她的父亲William Lloyd27岁，母亲Mrs William Lloyd30岁。她于1541年2月7日与Thomas Kynaston or Knutson在英国英格兰史洛普爾米德爾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1635年8月12日在英国英格兰史洛普爾享年83岁。

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Margeriae was born about 1553, in Ruyton XI Towns, Shropshire, England, her father, William Lloyd, was 27 and her mother, Mrs William Lloyd, was 30. She married Thomas Kynaston or Knutson on 7 February 1541, in Myddle, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 12 August 1635, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 83.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margeriae est née environ 1553, à Ruyton XI Towns, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, William Lloyd, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mrs William Lloyd, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Kynaston or Knutson le 7 février 1541, à Myddle, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 12 août 1635, à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 83 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margeriae um 1553 in Ruyton XI Towns, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Lloyd 27 und ihre Mutter Mrs William Lloyd 30. Sie hat am 7. Februar 1541 in Myddle, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Thomas Kynaston or Knutson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 12. August 1635 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margeriae è nata il circa 1553 nel Ruyton XI Towns, Shropshire, England, sua padre, William Lloyd, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Mrs William Lloyd, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Kynaston or Knutson il 7 febbraio 1541, nel Myddle, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 12 agosto 1635, nel Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 83 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margeriaeが約1553年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアルイトン クシ トウンスで生まれた時，父William Lloydは27歳，母Mrs William Lloydは30歳であった。1541年2月7日にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアムイッドルでThomas Kynaston or Knutsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1635年8月12日にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアで83歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margeriae(이)가 대략 1553년 영국 슈럽실르 루이턴 스이 타운스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Lloyd(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs William Lloyd(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1541년 2월 7일 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 마이들일에서 Thomas Kynaston or Knutson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1635년 8월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margeriae nasceu aproximadamente 1553, em Ruyton XI Towns, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Lloyd, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Mrs William Lloyd, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Kynaston or Knutson em 7 de fevereiro de 1541, em Myddle, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 12 de agosto de 1635, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 83 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margeriae родилась около 1553 г. в местности руитон кси тоунс, шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Lloyd было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs William Lloyd, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Kynaston or Knutson 7 февраля 1541 г. в местности миддл, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 12 августа 1635 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 83 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margeriae nació aproximadamente 1553, en Ruyton XI Towns, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Lloyd, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Mrs William Lloyd, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Thomas Kynaston or Knutson el 7 de febrero de 1541, en Myddle, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 12 de agosto de 1635, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 83 años.
